tasks.text: Implement `RoutingTable` (route storage, metric comparison, best-route selection)
Implement `RoutingEngine` (Babel update processing, route installation, withdrawal)
Implement `RouteCoordinator` (seqno management, feasibility conditions, starvation recovery)
Define `BleTransport` interface (connect, disconnect, send, receive, advertise)
Define `BleTransportConfig` (scan intervals, connection timeouts, advertisement settings)
Implement `AdvertisementCodec` (pseudonym + power tier in BLE advertisement)
Define `CryptoProvider` interface (X25519, Ed25519, ChaCha20-Poly1305, HKDF, HMAC-SHA256)
Implement `NoiseSession` (established session with send/recv CipherState pair)
Write `NoiseKSealOpenTest` — round-trip seal/open with nonce advancement
Write `WycheproofCryptoTest` — runner for all vector files
Write `PseudonymRotatorTest` — epoch computation, stagger, rotation timer
Implement `MeshStateManager` (periodic sweep: stale peers, expired routes)
Implement lifecycle management (start, stop, pause, resume)
Implement inbound message routing (handshake vs data path)
Define `MessagingConfig` (rate limits, timeouts, buffer sizes, appIdHash)
Wire cut-through into DeliveryPipeline relay path
Configure Dokka javadoc JAR generation (supports FR-001 and FR-002 publication requirements)
Create `ci.yml` (ktfmt, detekt, jvmTest, koverVerify, apiCheck, CI-shortened benchmark, coverage summary)
Create `codeql.yml` (weekly security scan: actions, c-cpp, java-kotlin)
Configure `.githooks/pre-commit` (ktfmt + detekt; supports constitution quality gates and FR-005 CI hygiene)
Run initial `apiDump` to establish baseline (supports FR-003 and SC-003)
Configure SKIE for Swift interop (exhaustive enums, AsyncStream)
Implement constitution-compliant `AndroidCryptoProvider` in `meshlink/src/androidMain/kotlin/ch/trancee/meshlink/crypto/AndroidCryptoProvider.kt` behind the project-owned `CryptoProvider` abstraction
Implement constitution-compliant `IosCryptoProvider` in `meshlink/src/iosMain/kotlin/ch/trancee/meshlink/crypto/IosCryptoProvider.kt` behind the project-owned `CryptoProvider` abstraction
Verify released Android and iOS publication outputs contain no third-party crypto binaries or native crypto payloads using `scripts/verify-publish.sh`
Verify `ci.yml` runs the CI-shortened benchmark suite required by FR-005
Implement `PowerManager` (orchestrator: battery poll → tier evaluation → policy enforcement)
Define `MeshLinkState` enum (UNINITIALIZED, RUNNING, PAUSED, STOPPED, RECOVERABLE, TERMINAL)
Define `DiagnosticCode` enum (26 codes with severity levels)
Implement `DiagnosticSink` (SharedFlow ring buffer, DROP_OLDEST, lazy eval)
Define `MeshLinkApi` interface (start, stop, pause, resume, send, peers, messages, diagnostics)
Implement `TransferSession` (per-transfer state machine: chunking, acking, completing)
Implement `ResumeCalculator` (offset from SACK state after disconnect)
Define `MessageType` enum (1-byte tag for all message types)
Implement `InboundValidator` (length bounds, hop limits, field constraints)
